ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE INC.'S DEMURRER: DEFENDANT'S GENERAL DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY, IF SHE IS ABLE TO DO SO, TO ALLEGE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF BOCKRATH V. ALDRICH CHEMICAL CO. INC. (1999) 21 CAL.4TH 71. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE SURVIVAL CAUSES OF ACTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 24 TO BE HEARD FOLLOWING THE COURT'S RULING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE THIS ACTION (NO. 275998) WITH THE PRIOR ACTION (NO. 275773). DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Anthony T. Topolsky of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant / moving party John Crane Inc.
Christopher Hersom of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Harry and Barbara Brownson

RULING:
DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant John Crane Inc.'s demurrer to the survival claims is off calendar as moot given the court's ruling on the motions to consolidate case numbers 275773 and 275998. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christopher Hersom of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Harry and Barbara Brownson
Anthony T. Topolsky of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant John Crane Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS BARBARA BROWNSON, ET AL.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 275773 and 275998 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 275773. One order for both cases was signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Continued To May-24-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Barry Endick of HASSARD B`ONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant / moving party John Crane, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Barbara Brownson, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant John Crane Inc.'s demurrer: Defendant's general demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiff the opportunity, if she is able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical Co. Inc. (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71. Defendant's demurrer to the survival causes of action is continued to May 24 to be heard following the court's ruling on plaintiff's motion to consolidate this action (no. 275998) with the prior action (no. 275773). Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Defendant John Crane Inc.¿S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim From Plaintiffs¿ Complaint For Survival, Wrongful Death - Asbestos
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Barry Endick of HASSARD B`ONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant / moving party John Crane, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Barbara Brownson, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM FROM PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT FOR SURVIVAL, WRONGFUL DEATH

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant John Crane Inc.'s motion to strike punitive damages claim from plaintiff's complaint is off calendar. Plaintiff has dismissed her claim for punitive damages against defendant. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
